product_overview: Laravel School Timetable Calendar System is a comprehensive web-based timetable management platform designed for educational institutions to manage academic programs, class schedules, room assignments, teacher allocations, and public timetable access efficiently.
core_goals: Enable administrators to create, edit, and manage class schedules with conflict detection and validation.
Provide role-based access control for administrators and teachers ensuring secure, appropriate access.
Manage academic programs, grade levels, and organize school classes hierarchically.
Offer detailed subject management including credit systems, scheduling modes, and teacher assignments.
Facilitate real-time validation for scheduling conflicts, room and teacher availability.
Provide comprehensive views such as master timetable, room timetables, teacher calendars, and public QR code accessible timetables.
Track lecture and laboratory hours per subject per class to ensure curriculum compliance.
Ensure system security via authentication, CSRF protection, and rate limiting.
key_features: User Authentication and Role-Based Access Control supporting admin and teachers with rate limiting and session management.
Academic Program Management covering Senior High School, College, and Diploma/TESDA programs with grade levels.
School Class Management with classes organized under academic programs and grade levels including active status management.
Subject Management including subject types (Minor/Major), scheduling modes (Lab/Lecture/Flexible), credit system, and assignment of teachers.
Teacher-Subject Assignment system to link teachers with subjects they are qualified to teach including validation.
Room Management system with support for regular and laboratory rooms, capacity tracking, equipment flags, and QR code generation for public access.
Lesson and Schedule Management supporting creation, editing, inline editing, conflict detection, duration calculation, and validation rules.
Master Timetable View presenting a room and time slot matrix with conflict highlights, utilization statistics, and export ability.
Room Timetable Views allowing individual room schedules and public access via QR codes.
Teacher Dashboard presenting personalized teaching schedules in calendar view.
Hours Tracking System monitoring scheduled vs required lecture and lab hours per subject-class pair with progress tracking.
Validation APIs for conflict checking, room availability, teacher availability, and alternative scheduling suggestions.
Public Room Timetable Access without authentication via QR code links.
Comprehensive search and filtering capabilities with pagination and session persistence.
Security features including CSRF protection, authentication, authorization, and QR code security against guessing.
user_flow_summary: User logs in via authentication system and accesses dashboards based on role (admin or teacher).
Admin manages academic programs, grade levels, and school classes via CRUD interfaces.
Admin creates subjects and assigns teachers to subjects with validation checks ensuring teacher qualification.
Admin manages rooms including regular classrooms and laboratories with equipment tracking and capacity information.
Admin schedules lessons specifying class, subject, teacher, room, weekday, and time, while system validates conflicts and scheduling rules.
Teachers view their personal teaching schedules in a calendar interface, filtering as needed.
Admin accesses master timetable showing all rooms and time slots with conflict and utilization indicators.
Admin or public users view room-specific timetables; public access is granted via QR code links without login.
Validation APIs are called to check scheduling conflicts and fetch available rooms or alternative time options during scheduling.
Hours tracking allows monitoring scheduled lecture and lab hours per subject-class combination to ensure curriculum compliance.
Admins utilize inline editing and search/filter functions to efficiently manage lessons and navigate schedules.
validation_criteria: Authentication limits login attempts to 5 per minute with correct session handling.
Role-based access controls strictly enforce permissions for admin and teacher roles.
Scheduling operations prevent class, teacher, and room double-booking with real-time conflict detection.
Lesson times are validated to fall within school hours (7 AM to 9 PM) and end time is after start time.
Teachers must be assigned to a subject before they can be scheduled for lessons in that subject.
Rooms accommodate subject requirements, including lab requirements and equipment availability.
Hours tracking accurately reflects scheduled vs required lecture and lab hours with progress calculations.
QR code-generated public room timetables are accessible without authentication and link securely to correct rooms.
API endpoints for validation, lesson management, and timetable data respond correctly with authorized access.
User interfaces maintain session-persistent search filters, and pagination with accurate data display.
All forms include CSRF protection and validation errors are handled gracefully with user-friendly feedback.
System must gracefully handle expired sessions and unauthorized access attempts.

features.name: Authentication System
features.description: User authentication with login, logout, rate limiting (5 attempts per minute), and session management. Password reset and email verification are disabled.

features.name: User Management
features.description: CRUD operations for managing users with role-based access control. Supports admin and teacher roles. Mass delete functionality included.

features.name: Role Management
features.description: Role-based access control system with permissions. Supports role creation, editing, deletion, and permission assignment.

features.name: Permission Management
features.description: Permission management system for fine-grained access control. Supports permission creation, editing, deletion, and role assignment.

features.name: Academic Program Management
features.description: Management of academic programs (Senior High School, College, Diploma/TESDA) with grade levels, duration, and program types.

features.name: School Class Management
features.description: Management of school classes organized by academic programs and grade levels. Supports class creation, editing, and program-based filtering.

features.name: Subject Management
features.description: Subject management with types (Minor/Major), scheduling modes (Lab/Lecture/Flexible), credit system, and teacher assignment functionality.

features.name: Lesson/Schedule Management
features.description: Core scheduling system for creating, editing, and managing lessons. Includes inline editing, conflict detection, hours tracking, and validation.

features.name: Room Management
features.description: Room management system with support for regular classrooms and laboratories. Includes capacity tracking, equipment flags, and QR code generation.

features.name: Master Timetable
features.description: Comprehensive master timetable view showing all lessons across rooms and time slots. Includes conflict detection, room utilization stats, and export functionality.

features.name: Room Timetable
features.description: Individual room timetable views showing schedules for specific rooms. Includes public access via QR codes.

features.name: Public Room Timetable
features.description: Public access to room timetables without authentication, accessible via QR code links.

features.name: Teacher Dashboard
features.description: Dashboard for teachers to view their personal teaching schedules and calendar.

features.name: Student Calendar
features.description: Calendar view for students to view their class schedules (if student role is enabled).

features.name: Validation System
features.description: Real-time validation system for scheduling conflicts, room availability, teacher availability, and alternative time slots.

features.name: Hours Tracking
features.description: System for tracking lecture and laboratory hours per subject per class. Calculates scheduled hours, remaining hours, and scheduling progress.

features.name: Time Management
features.description: Time-related utilities for time slot management, duration calculations, and time formatting.

features.name: Cache Management
features.description: Cache invalidation service for managing application cache and ensuring data consistency.

features.name: API Endpoints
features.description: RESTful API endpoints for lessons, users, roles, permissions, and school classes. Supports DataTables integration.

features.name: Middleware
features.description: Custom middleware for authentication, role checking, CSRF protection, and request handling.

features.name: Admin Layout
features.description: Admin dashboard layout with navigation menu, sidebar, and responsive design.
